chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 4495 of 2016 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For bail before arrest For hearing of main case 12.09.2019 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Special Prosecutor NAB. Mr. Ali Raza Pathan, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Petitioner Ashique Ali having CNIC No. 43304-6131327-7 filed statement to withdraw the petition as he has entered into plea bargain. Such order accepting the plea bargain passed by the trial Court dated 05.09.2019 is also attached with the statement filed by the petitioner. In the view of above, aforesaid petition is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
